ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the species */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species name */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Current conservation status of the species */,
  "average_lifespan" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of the species in years */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Primary diet of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Primary habitat where the species is found */,
  "migration_pattern" TEXT /* Description of the migration pattern of the species */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_genus FOREIGN KEY ("genus") REFERENCES genus ("genus_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "genus" (
  "genus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genus */,
  "genus_name" TEXT /* Name of the genus */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the genus */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of a representative species in the genus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Name of the family */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the family */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of a representative species in the family */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kingdom" (
  "kingdom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each kingdom */,
  "kingdom_name" TEXT /* Name of the kingdom */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the kingdom */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kingdom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phylum" (
  "phylum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phylum */,
  "phylum_name" TEXT /* Name of the phylum */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the phylum */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phylum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phylum_class" (
  "phylum_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phylum-class relationship */,
  "phylum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the phylum */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phylum_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "order_name" TEXT /* Name of the order */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_order" (
  "family_order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family-order relationship */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* ID of the family */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genus_family" (
  "genus_family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genus-family relationship */,
  "genus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genus */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* ID of the family */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genus_family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sightings" (
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sighting */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species */,
  "location" TEXT /* The location where the species was sighted */,
  "date" TEXT /* The date of the sighting */,
  "observer" TEXT /* The name of the observer */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the sighting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sighting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sightings_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission relationship */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
